title: Present Simple
usage: Dien ta su that hien nhien
Dien ta lich trinh co dinh

examples.vi: Toi hoc tieng Anh moi ngay.

practice.question: She ___ English every morning.
practice.explanation: She la ngoi thu ba so it nen dong tu them s.

title: Present Continuous
usage: Ke hoach gan trong tuong lai

examples.en: I am working on a new project.
examples.vi: Toi dang lam viec tren mot du an moi.

commonMistakes: Dung V-ing voi stative verbs khong phu hop

practice.question: They ___ a meeting now.
practice.explanation: Now la dau hieu hien tai tiep dien.

title: Past Simple
usage: Hanh dong da ket thuc trong qua khu
Chuoi su kien trong qua khu

examples.vi: Chung toi da hoan thanh bao cao hom qua.

commonMistakes: Quen dong tu bat quy tac

practice.question: He ___ the invoice last Monday.
practice.explanation: Last Monday can qua khu don, send thanh sent.

title: Future With Will
usage: Quyet dinh tai thoi diem noi

examples.en: I will call the client tomorrow.
examples.vi: Toi se goi cho khach hang vao ngay mai.

practice.question: We ___ the results soon.
practice.explanation: Soon co the dung voi tuong lai will.

title: Comparatives

structure.positive: S + be + adjective-er/more adjective + than + O
structure.negative: S + be not + as + adjective + as + O
structure.question: Be + S + adjective-er/more adjective + than + O?

usage: So sanh hai nguoi, vat hoac y tuong

examples.en: This process is more efficient than the old one.
examples.vi: Quy trinh nay hieu qua hon quy trinh cu.

commonMistakes: Dung more voi tinh tu ngan sai cach

practice.question: This plan is ___ than that one.
practice.explanation: Good co dang so sanh hon bat quy tac la better.

title: Present Perfect
usage: Ket qua lien quan hien tai
Hanh dong bat dau qua khu va con tiep tuc

examples.vi: Toi da hoan thanh bai quiz.

commonMistakes: Dung qua khu don voi since/for

practice.question: She ___ the document already.
practice.explanation: Already thuong dung voi hien tai hoan thanh.
